title: Spaghetti Aglio e Olio
description: A classic Neapolitan pasta with garlic, olive oil, chilli, and parsley.
steps: Cook spaghetti in salted water until al dente, reserving one cup of pasta water.
Gently sauté garlic and chilli in olive oil until fragrant and golden without burning.
Add the drained spaghetti and toss thoroughly, loosening with reserved pasta water as needed.
Finish with parsley and optional cheese. Serve immediately.
notes: Imported from the original Singh's Connoisseur Corner recipe collection.
